channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: SLSA 1.0 and Sigstore: why every repo needs them in
item.description: Cut unsigned dependency risk 100% with SLSA 1.0 and Sigstore in 2026 — concrete pipeline, cost, and latency numbers for bootstrappers and Series B teams.

item.title: AWS Lambda replaced Airflow for half our pipelines
item.description: Cut data pipeline costs 68% by replacing Airflow with Lambda + Step Functions — the real AWS bill, latency, and code changes that worked in 2026

item.title: USSD fintech in 2026: the 300M user channel nobody
item.description: Cut USSD latency to under 2s & costs to $0.25 per 1k sessions in 2026 — Node 20 LTS, DynamoDB & CloudWatch setup with real carrier SLA results and Africa’s Talking sandbox.

item.title: MCP server timeouts: why your tools vanish after 30s
item.description: Cut MCP server timeouts 90% by fixing Docker keepalive and MTU issues — exact sysctl values, Docker Compose snippets, and Lambda configs for 2026.

item.title: 50 edge locations: what breaks in your backend
item.description: Cut API latency 60% by running in 50 edge locations — the TTL mistake that wastes 3 days, connection pool sizing at 512 MB, and why Redis 7.2 central cache costs more than edge-native.

item.title: Tool-calling patterns that survive prod vs those that
item.description: Cut p99 latency 97% and save $4k/month with BullMQ 4.13 vs static Redis pools — connection exhaustion, queue depth, and circuit breaker tuning that actually work in 2026.

item.title: CSS finally fixed my CSS problems
item.description: Cut CSS bundle size 89%, build time 95%, and CloudFront costs 50% with container queries, @layer, and CSS variables — the tools that finally retired utility frameworks in 2026.

item.title: Local LLMs on MacBook Pro: the 4 models that run
item.description: Local LLMs in 2026 cut AI costs to $0 and battery drain 40% on a MacBook Pro — benchmarks for four models that finally run usably, with concrete latency, RAM, and power numbers.

item.title: Save $12k/month: cloud egress costs in 2026
item.description: Save $3k/month on cloud egress costs in 2026 with 7 real architecture moves tested in production. Includes code, benchmarks, and the PrivateLink trick most teams miss.

item.title: Personal AI assistants: avoid vendor lock-in traps
item.description: Cut 98% of AI assistant costs without vendor lock-in — Redis 7.2 caching, OpenSearch 2.11 search, and vLLM 0.4.0 self-hosted models deliver P95 latency under 1.2s and $0.12 per 1k calls.

item.title: AI UI tools: what they’ll ship, what they’ll break
item.description: Cut UI time 60% with AI tools — but they’ll ship broken components if you skip validation. Real numbers, concrete steps, and the mistakes I made in 2026.

item.title: Vibe coding: 9 reasons it dies in production
item.description: Cut production incidents 94% by adding tests to vibe-coded MVPs — FastAPI + pytest, Node + Jest, Go 1.22 benchmarks and the real gotchas most teams miss.

item.title: AI agents eat your budget 3 ways
item.description: The gap between what the docs say and what production needs Most AI agent tutorials end at "here’s the prompt and a success case." They don’t mention what…

item.title: AI tools cut rates 30%: what’s real in 2026
item.description: Freelance rates fell 30% in 2026 — but only for the wrong stack. Learn which 20% of work still commands $90+/hr and which 80% got commoditized by AI agents.

item.title: 7 code review traps when AI writes half your code
item.description: Cut code review time 70% when AI writes half your code — the exact checklist and tools teams used in 2026 to catch AI-specific bugs before they hit production.

item.title: Replaced Celery in 2026: what actually worked
item.description: Replaced Celery in 2026 and cut API latency 85% with NATS JetStream + Go workers — $2,400/month Redis savings, 3× Black Friday traffic handled without errors

item.title: Postgres killed three tools: the 2026 stack audit
item.description: Cut infra cost 42% by replacing Redis, TimescaleDB, and pg_partman with Postgres 17’s native features in 2026 — benchmarks, p99 traps, and the exact flags to set.

item.title: INP 2026: one tweak cut 67% of slow clicks
item.description: Cut INP 67% in 2026 with scheduler.postTask, Comlink cache, and a CSS spinner — the real steps that worked on low-end devices in Kenya and Uganda.

item.title: Onboard devs to AI code: guardrails vs chaos
item.description: Cut PR merge time 70% with chaos-first AI tooling; or keep risk low with guardrails-first validation. Which onboarding path saves you $3.8k/month in 2026? Get the benchmarks, code samples, and decision matrix.

item.title: 2026 tech salaries: where cuts stopped, where raises
item.description: Tech salaries in 2026 settled into two tracks: niche roles up 15–25%, mass-market roles flat or down 5–15%. Compare Nairobi bands by role, funding stage, and product type — with real offer math and tax gotchas.
